documentation.description: Handle for an event. Can be used to cancel it:

simple_types.name: Object
simple_types.code: type Object (Stack_size : Natural := 64 * 1024) is limited private;

access_types.name: Object_access
access_types.code: type Object_access is access all Object;

documentation.description: Returned by Get_Next_Deadline when no other deadline exists.

documentation.description:
Suspend/Resume execution of events
On resume, all expired events will be executed.

Premature termination (if events pending).
If no events pending, termination should be automatic

Suspend/Resume execution of events
On resume, all expired events will be executed.
